title: The UK’s first Trade Policy Review at the World Trade Organization (WTO): UK government report
body: "The report:   explains the UK’s strategic vision for achieving sustainable, inclusive and resilient growth through trade, underpinned by the Trade Strategy, Industrial Strategy, and ‘Backing your Business’ plan for small and medium-sized enterprises showcases the UK’s leadership in shaping trade policy, with a strong emphasis on placing businesses at the heart of policymaking describes the UK’s ambitions in multilateral, plurilateral and bilateral trade   "
